description: Flashed a 5.11 and two hard tens, almost flashed another 5.11 and got stuck on s slab climb

Fell at the top of the 12 3 times, almost got the 11d, last move!

Hit my 3000ft goal for february
Worked on a 5.12- with Roman, got two 5.10+ sends on lead, a couple 5.9 laps to finish
Flashed a 5.12-, first time in a while, then climbed a bunch of other stuff
Quick session with roman, first climb didnt track height or length
I’ll definitely get the 5.10+ clean next time. I also think i can get a bit further or complete the 5.11 if i try it first

Got a few new 5.10s on lead w/ roman
Also got up a 5.11 

More social climb, not a lot of wall time
